request: create-baseline upgrade misreports state on no-op re-runs against an upgraded project. Fix two bugs (missing baseline_version in saved manifest causes perpetual legacy warning; unconditional .mcp.json SPECIAL_MERGE inflates Applied N count) and add a version-aware no-op fast-path by recording baseline_version in <target>/.claude/.baseline-manifest.json and surfacing it in <target>/.claude/project.json.
